column1:
"Who's that over there?"

"Oh, it's our new teacher,________just started work today."

"Which CD did you get Marcus in the end?"

"I got him the one___________said he really wanted to hear."

"Who did you send a Valentine's card to?"

"I'm not telling you, but it was someone__________name begins with "B"."

"Have you seen Jason Green's latest film?"

"Is that the one in_____________joins the FBI?"

"Why do you like Tina so much?"

"Well, she's one of the few people to_____________I can really talk."

"Why don't we go to Lionel's for dinner tonight?"

"Is that the new restaurant________________has just opened on the other side of town?"

"Could you lend me some money?"

"I'd like you to give me one good reason_________I should"

"What do you want to do this summer?"

"I think we should go somewhere____________has plenty of sun and sand."
